description: Well-documented design with minor gaps only
design_doc:
# Notification Service v3

## Problem
Current email notifications are delayed by up to 2 hours due to batch processing. We need near-real-time delivery.

## Solution
Event-driven notification microservice triggered by domain events via message queue.

## Data
Handles customer email addresses only. No financial data. Data classified as PII-Low. Encrypted in transit via TLS 1.3. No data stored at rest.

## Integration points
- Domain event bus (internal)
- SendGrid API (external email provider) — risk assessed, SLA confirmed

## Security
OAuth2 client credentials for internal auth. SendGrid API key stored in secrets manager.
Input validation follows OWASP guidelines. No PII logged.

## NFRs
99.9% availability. <500ms end-to-end latency. Auto-scaling via Kubernetes HPA.

## Rollback
Feature flag controls rollout. Instant rollback to batch system via flag toggle. Confirmed with comms team.

## Ownership
Platform Engineering team. On-call via PagerDuty rotation.

## Gaps
CWE categories not yet formally reviewed. Audit logging design pending.
expected_unclear_criteria: Known CWE categories considered for this component type
Audit logging of decisions/actions in place
